item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektif memang menjadi prioritas utama, tapi itu bukan berarti hak individu tidak dihargai.

notes: Agent A starts clearly pro-society and remains somewhat pro-society by the end, but visibly softens into caveats about individual rights, unfairness, and people feeling controlled. Agent B stays rights-first throughout, with bounded concessions that collective action can be necessary and that too much individualism can neglect communal responsibilities. No complete reversal.
